en.name: Level 81 — Afterhours Ending
en.shortDescription: A dreamlike office space turned restful sanctuary, softened with furnishings, paintings and the sound of gentle rain.
en.atmosphere: Tranquil and calming: muted colors, drooping willows and soft rain creating an overwhelming sense of weary comfort.
en.tips: A safe haven for rest. Move gently — don't disturb the peaceful atmosphere or try to wake from this dreamlike state.
